defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Kylian Mbappe's face celebrating in a white Real Madrid jersey, his face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: In 2023 the Saudi Arabian club Al Hilal made Kylian Mbappe a record offer worth close to one billion dollars, the richest deal in football history, but Mbappe turned it down to chase his childhood dream of playing for Real Madrid
videos.video_script: In 2023, Saudi club Al Hilal offered Mbappe almost a billion dollars. He said no, walked away from the richest deal ever, and chased Real Madrid. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Kylian Mbappe Real Madrid celebration close up, Kylian Mbappe screaming celebration, Kylian Mbappe France celebration, Kylian Mbappe sprint dribble, Kylian Mbappe goal celebration, Kylian Mbappe serious face, Kylian Mbappe close up face, Kylian Mbappe white jersey
